title: humulus scandens var. variegatus
intro: Humulus scandens var. variegatus, also known as Japanese hops or variegated hop, is a variety of the Humulus scandens plant, a member of the Cannabaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Humulus scandens var. variegatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for cardiovascular and mental health issues. Humulus scandens var. variegatus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, or used topically in creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
